reasoning: The control CM-3 focuses on configuration change control, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through mechanisms that ensure changes are controlled, audited, and reversible. Admission controllers can enforce policies that prevent unauthorized configuration changes. RBAC can be used to ensure that only authorized users can make configuration changes, and auditing can track these changes. Additionally, ensuring etcd backups are enabled allows for recovery from unauthorized or erroneous changes.
title: Configuration Change Control
